description_long: This is a large, robust wooden storage crate constructed from weathered planks, reinforced with diagonal and horizontal wooden braces on each side. The wood grain is clearly visible, with knots and natural imperfections adding to its rugged, utilitarian appearance. Several sides feature adhesive labels and warning signs, including a prominent flammable materials warning, suggesting it is used for transporting or storing hazardous goods. The top of the crate is flat and solid, with additional bracing for structural integrity. There are no visible handles or locking mechanisms, and the lid appears to be a removable flat panel. The crate is designed for placement on the ground or in industrial and urban environments such as warehouses, garages, or loading docks.
description: A large, weathered wooden storage crate with visible grain, bracing, and warning labels, designed for industrial or urban use.
description_view_0: This view shows a side of the crate with diagonal bracing and a blue-and-white adhesive label on the top left corner.
description_view_1: This side features a similar diagonal brace but no visible labels or signage, highlighting the natural wood grain.
description_view_2: This view displays two adhesive labels on the lower panels and a clear view of the crate's reinforced wooden construction.
description_view_3: This side is marked by a prominent flammable warning sign and a blue-and-white label on the top right, emphasizing its use for hazardous materials.
